name: Codonopsis
summary: It is best framed as a gentler tonic-style root with modest modern evidence.
description: It is best framed as a gentler tonic-style root with modest modern evidence.
safetyNotes: Immune-active potential; use caution with autoimmune disease, transplant medicines, immunosuppressants, and during active cancer treatment unless clinician-supervised.
interactions: use clinician review for high-dose extracts or chronic use.
dosage: Preparation-specific; use standardized product label for Root/rhizome preparations are commonly used as teas and require source-backed dosage review before therapeutic claims.
typical_dosage: Preparation-specific; use standardized product label for Root/rhizome preparations are commonly used as teas and require source-backed dosage review before therapeutic claims.
